ett.raw_estimand: ((Sum[Z](P[Z](X) * P[X,Z](Y) * P(Z)) / Sum[Y, Z](Sum[Z](P[Z](X) * P[X,Z](Y) * P(Z)))))
ett.observational_estimand: ((Sum[Z](P(X | Z) * P(Y | X, Z) * P(Z)) / Sum[Y, Z](Sum[Z](P(X | Z) * P(Y | X, Z) * P(Z)))))

metadata.proposed_domain: Epidemiology and Public Health in Interwar Prisoner of War Camps (1919-1924)
